name: com.automox/automox-mcp
title: Automox MCP Server
description: Official MCP server for Automox. Manage devices, patches, and policies in natural language.

environmentVariables.name: AUTOMOX_ACCOUNT_UUID
environmentVariables.description: Account UUID from Automox Settings > Secrets & Keys

environmentVariables.name: AUTOMOX_ORG_ID
environmentVariables.description: Numeric Automox organization ID. Recommended — required by most tools, optional for tools that don't need org context.
